testcases.input: arr = [6,4,14,6,8,13,9,7,10,6,12], d = 2 Output: 4 Explanation: You can start at index 10. You can jump 10 --> 8 --> 6 --> 7 as shown. Note that if you start at index 6 you can only jump to index 7. You cannot jump to index 5 because 13 > 9. You cannot jump to index 4 because index 5 is between index 4 and 6 and 13 > 9. Similarly You cannot jump from index 3 to index 2 or index 1.
